mb3.text: We softened the arm profile from the first pass — sits lower against the window line.

render:living:v2.text: Lighting re-balanced for the 6pm sun study you asked about.

messages.text: Welcome to your portal. Everything we decide together lives here — moodboards, renders, approvals and the schedule.
Site measurements are confirmed. Design Development is underway.
Two sofa directions are on the moodboard — the bouclé is our recommendation for the light in that room.
The Dedar bouclé is backordered at the mill. We have two alternatives ready if the 12-week window doesn't work.
